title: Retrospective incognito mode
excerpt: When everybody is writing on the Retrospective board would be nice to enable an Incognito Mode :dotted_line_face: so those writing only can’t see what others are writing until the Incognito veal  is lifted to vote. This …

posts.author: german.brea (Germán Brea)
posts.cookedHtml: When everybody is writing on the Retrospective board would be nice to enable an Incognito Mode so those writing only can’t see what others are writing until the Incognito veal is lifted to vote. This would avoid people from copying others or be distracted by others’ ideas during this phase of the retrospective (e.g. how it works on stickies.io)
